slides.title: [Bridge from starting metric to ending metric]

analysisColumns.heading: [Phase 1: FY21 to FY22]
body: [Revenue recovery increased transaction volumes and lifted gross contribution.]
[Cost inflation in labor and software partially offset growth-driven gains.]

analysisColumns.heading: [Phase 2: FY22 to FY23]
body: [Service-mix shift and implementation volume supported top-line expansion.]
[Contractor and support costs increased while platform spending ramped.]

analysisColumns.heading: [Phase 3: FY23 to TTM Jun-24]
body: [Volume growth in core channels sustained margin expansion.]
[Remaining margin drag is concentrated in variable and transition costs.]
